explanations.1: This special comment tells Docker to use a specific version of the Dockerfile syntax parser, which gives us access to newer Docker features.
explanations.3: The 'AS base' part gives this stage a name so we can refer back to it later if we're building multiple stages in one Dockerfile.
explanations.12: This keeps the container alive by running a command that never exits, so the container doesn't immediately shut down after starting.
